headline: LyondellBasell completes sale of select European strategic assessment assets
summary: Transaction with AEQUITA advances company’s portfolio realignmentROTTERDAM, Netherlands, May 01, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- LyondellBasell (NYSE: LYB) today announced that it has successfully completed the sale of select European olefins and polyolefins assets, and the associated business and corporate functions, to AEQUITA as a key milestone in the company’s European strategic assessment.
